resources.string: Mufhiso %1$s wo tsela fhasi kha mukano waṋu wa %2$s
Tsevho: U tendela khetho i re afho nṱha zwi nga fhelisa beṱiri yaṋu nga u ṱavhanya u fhira nga nḓila yo ḓoweleaho
Tshikhethi tsha Muvhala wa Muvhuso wa Widget
Zwi sa ṱoḓei: URL yo khetheaho
URL yo khetheaho a yo ngo vhewa, kana a i na tshithu. Ni nga dzhena kha zwishumiswa u engedza URL yo khetheaho
URL ya %1$s yo vha i si na tshithu, kha vha sedze faila yavho ya %2$s vha lingedze hafhu
Phumula Data yothe na u vala
Zwo kundelwa u ṱanganya data ya %1$s na data ya %2$s
Ro kundelwa u shuma datha ya vhubvo
Zwo kundelwa u shuma kha faila ya %1$s
Zwo kundelwa u shuma zwavhuḓi datha ya mutsho u bva kha seva yaṋu, zwihuluhulu datha ya %1$s
Tshikhethi tsha Muvhala wa Phanda wa Widget
Kha vha dzhene kha URL kha %1$s
Tshifhinga tsha u bvumba (arali zwi tshi konadzea)
Lushaka lwa vhubvo ’%1$s’ a lu shumi, sedzani faila ya nzudzanyo yaṋu nahone ni lingedze hafhu
URL ya vhubvo a yo ngo vhewa, i vhee kha %1$s
Ndi do zwi lugisa nda lingedza hafhu
App iyi yo khwiniswa fhedzi server ine na khou ṱangana nayo a i athu khwiniswa Inigo Plugin ya weeWX. Masimu a nga kha ḓi sa vhonala zwavhuḓi u swikela weeWX i tshi khwiniswa
Tshifhinga tsha u vusuludza a tshi shumi, vusuludzani zwishumiswa nahone ni lingedze hafhu

%1$s zwino i ṱoḓa faila ya data ya %2$s u bva kha seva ya %3$s, ni fanela u khwinisa %4$s na u khwinisa faila ya %5$s phanḓa ha musi app iyi i tshi ḓo shuma zwavhuḓi. Kha vha dzhene kha Ok u wana zwidodombedzwa zwo engedzeaho kha %6$s
Sethe ya u vusuludza nga tshanḓa, swipa tshikirini tsha u vusuludza u itela u ḓadza
Mufhiso %1$s wo gonya wa swika kha mukano waṋu wa %2$s
A hu na u dawuniḽouda kana app i sa athu setupwaho
Nḓivhadzo dzi a ṱoḓea u itela u ni tsivhudza musi thempheretsha, mvula kana tshikalo tsha mvula zwi tshi swikelela mikano ye na i vhea
Sa vhunga vho hana thendelo ya nḓivhadzo luvhili, vha fanela u i tendela kha zwishumiswa nṱhani hazwo, vha thome zwishumiswa?
Kha vha lindele ri tshi khou khwaṱhisedza URL ye vha i rumela

plurals.name: processing_errors2
plurals.item: Ho wanala vhukhakhi ha %1$d musi hu tshi khou khwiniswa, sedzani %2$s logs u itela zwidodombedzwa
Ho vha na vhukhakhi ha %1$d ho wanalaho musi hu tshi khou khwiniswa, sedzani %2$s logs u itela zwidodombedzwa

plurals.name: processing_errors
plurals.item: Ho vha na vhukhakhi ha %1$d ho wanalaho kha faila ya %2$s, sedzani faila ya %2$s yo wanalaho kha %3$s kana ni sedze log dza %4$s u itela zwidodombedzwa
Ho vha na vhukhakhi ha %1$d ho wanalaho kha faela ya %2$s, sedzani faela ya %2$s yo wanalaho kha %3$s kana ni sedze %4$s ḽogo u itela zwidodombedzwa

resources.string: Ro kundelwa u dawuniḽouda tshifanyiso tsha radara
Tshifanyiso tsha radar tshi kha di dawuniḽoudiwa
Lushaka lwa radara ’%1$s’ a lu shumi, sedzani faila ya nzudzanyo dzaṋu nahone ni lingedze hafhu
URL ya radara a yo ngo vhewa. Ni nga ya kha zwishumiswa u itela u shandula
U vha tsivhudza duvha na duvha arali mvula i tshi swika kha mikano yo vhewaho
Mvula %1$s yo lingana na mukano waṋu wa %2$s
Nḓivhadzo arali tshikalo tsha mvula tshi tshi fhira mukano wo khwaṱhaho wo ḓisendekaho kha tshifhinga tsha mvula
Mvula ya %1$s kha %2$d yo fhelaho %3$s yo swika kha ḽeveḽe ya ’Severe’
Nḓivhadzo arali tshikalo tsha mvula tshi tshi fhira mikano ya tsivhudzo yo ḓisendekaho kha tshifhinga tsha mvula
Mvula ya %1$s kha %2$d %3$s yo fhelaho yo swika kha maimo a ’Tsevho’
Nḓivhadzo arali tshikalo tsha mvula tshi tshi fhira mikano ya watshi yo ḓisendekaho kha tshifhinga tsha mvula
Mvula ya %1$s kha %2$d yo fhiraho %3$s yo swika kha ḽeveḽe ya ’Watch’
Kha vha sedze Nḓivhadzo ya Mvula
Ni na vhutanzi uri ni khou toda u bvisa data yothe?
Vhulunga ḽogo dza vhukhakhi ha app
Ndi kha di dawuniḽouda data ya vhubvo
Ndi kha di dawuniḽouda data ya mutsho
U tsivhudza u swika luvhili nga ḓuvha musi mufhiso u tshi swika kha mikano yaṋu yo vhewaho
Ho itea vhukhakhi vhu sa ḓivhei
Setha kha u khwiniswa nga zwanḓa, fhedzi a hu athu vha na zwi re ngomu zwo vhulungwaho
Update musi u tshi khou gidima
URL yo vhewa kha mvelele kana yo vha i si na tshithu
Shumisani zwifhinga zwo teaho zwa u khwinisa
A vho ngo kona u ṱumanya kana u dawuniḽouda u bva kha URL yo bulwaho
A tho ngo kona u ṱumanya kana u dawuniḽouda vhubvo
A vho ngo kona u ṱumanya kana u dawuniḽouda %1$s u bva kha %2$s
A vho ngo kona u ṱangana kana u dawuniḽouda u bva kha %1$s
A vho ngo kona u ṱumanya kana u dawuniḽouda radar= tshifanyiso kha inthanethe
A vho ngo kona u ṱumanya kana u dawuniḽouda zwishumiswa u bva kha seva yavho
A vho ngo kona u ṱumanya kana u dawuniḽouda tshifanyiso tsha webcam u bva kha seva yavho
Tshifanyiso tsha Webcam tshi kha ḓi dawuniḽoudiwa
URL ya Webcam a yo ngo vhewa kana a i na tshithu
Ndi nga vha ndo no khwinisa fhedzi vhuṱumani ha Wi-Fi a vhu wanali
